subcodes.first_line: Say: O Lord, my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the All-Dominant over all names, and by Thy signs which have filled the earth and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک المهیمن علی الاسماء و بایاتک التی ملئت الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
